kp9:1.1: This is to be done by one skilled in aims
kp9:1.4: easy to instruct, gentle, & not conceited,
kp9:3.1: Do not do the slightest thing
kp9:3.2:
that the observant would later censure.
Think:
kp9:3.4: may all beings be happy at heart.
kp9:5.4: May all beings be happy at heart.
kp9:7.1: As a mother would risk her life
kp9:7.2: to protect her child, her only child,
kp9:7.3: even so should one cultivate the heart limitlessly
kp9:8.1: With goodwill for the entire cosmos,
kp9:9.2: sitting, or lying down, as long as one has banished torpor,
kp9:9.3: one should be determined on this mindfulness.
kp9:9.4: This is called a Brahmā abiding here.
kp9:10.4: one never again will lie in the womb.
